name: Mixtral 8x22B
note: Larger Apache-2.0 sparse MoE (141B total / 39B active) with a 64K context window and native function calling; strong multilingual, math and code.
tpsNote: Does not fit a single RTX 4090 (24GB) even at Q4 (~80GB needed); requires multi-GPU or large unified-memory hardware

results.notes: [relabeled self-reported: aggregator/press relay of a vendor figure, not an independent re-measurement]

verificationNotes: Fetched mistral.ai/news/mixtral-8x22b/ directly: confirms 2024-04-17 release, 141B/39B params, 64K context, Apache 2.0 ('most permissive open-source licence'), native function calling, 5 languages (English/French/Italian/German/Spanish), GSM8K 90.8 maj@8 and MATH 44.6 maj@4. Fetched HF discussion directly: shows 'acc: 0.7735' i.e. 77.35% -- record's 77.3 is a reasonable truncation of this literal figure, not fabricated. No changes made.
